---
title: "Postdoctoral Position at Tufts University"
date: 2025-04-29
description: "I've accepted a postdoctoral position at Tufts University! I'll be working with [Dr. Elizabeth Newman](https://elizabethnewman.owlstown.net/)."
---

I've accepted a postdoctoral position at Tufts University! I'll be working with
[Dr. Elizabeth Newman](https://elizabethnewman.owlstown.net/).
